exercises.title: Verify Inverse
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

def qft(n):
    N = 2**n
    omega = np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
    return np.array([[omega**(j*k) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)])/np.sqrt(N)

QFT = qft(3)
QFT_inv = # Your code
print('QFT · QFT⁻¹ = I:', np.allclose(QFT @ QFT_inv, np.eye(8)))
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def qft(n):
    N = 2**n
    omega = np.exp(2j*np.pi/N)
    return np.array([[omega**(j*k) for k in range(N)] for j in range(N)])/np.sqrt(N)

QFT = qft(3)
QFT_inv = QFT.conj().T
print('QFT · QFT⁻¹ = I:', np.allclose(QFT @ QFT_inv, np.eye(8)))
